title: Pattern-Matrix Patterns Registry
description: Project-supplied override of the built-in pattern catalog for the pattern-matrix discovery agent. When .dw-lifecycle/scope-discovery/pattern-matrix-patterns.yaml exists, its `patterns:` list REPLACES the agent's built-in defaults (does not merge). Each entry declares a kebab-case id, a description, a regex source string, and optional extension filter.

patterns.description: Override list. Replaces the agent's built-in catalog when this file is present.

id.description: Stable kebab-case identifier surfaced in the agent's output.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the pattern catches.

regex.description: RegExp source string. Compiled with the 'g' flag by the agent.

extensions.description: Optional file-extension filter. When set, the pattern only scans files whose name ends in one of these strings (e.g., ['.tsx', '.ts']).
